_comment: OpenSearch index mapping for paper_chunks — deployed by the opensearch-initializer Lambda after StorageStack is up.

section_id._comment: Section identifier e.g. abstract, sec_1, sec_2

chunk_index._comment: Zero-based chunk position within the section

text._comment: Chunk text — used for BM25 full-text search

embedding._comment: 1536-dim Titan Embeddings V2 vector — used for dense KNN search

token_start._comment: Start token position within the section (late chunking)

token_end._comment: End token position within the section (late chunking)

token_count._comment: Number of tokens in this chunk

char_count._comment: Number of characters in this chunk

has_equations._comment: True if chunk contains LaTeX equations

has_tables._comment: True if chunk references a table

published_date._comment: Paper publication date — used for date-range filtering

ingested_at._comment: Timestamp when chunk was indexed (set by ingest pipeline)

authors._comment: List of author names — keyword for exact/filter queries

categories._comment: arXiv categories e.g. cs.AI, cs.LG — for category filtering

entities._comment: Named entities (MODEL, DATASET, METHOD, etc.) extracted by Claude Haiku

concepts._comment: General research concepts e.g. attention, tokenization

title._comment: Paper title — boosted in BM25 queries (^3)

abstract._comment: Paper abstract — boosted in BM25 queries (^1.5)
